liquibase.configuration

Interface AutoloadedConfigurations

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ChangeLogParserCofiguration, ChangeLogParserConfiguration, DefaultLoggerConfiguration, GlobalConfiguration, GlobalConfiguration, HubConfiguration, LiquibaseCommandLineConfiguration, SqlConfiguration

    public interface AutoloadedConfigurations
    Marker interface for a class containing ConfigurationDefinition which should be auto-loaded at Liquibase startup. All classes that implement this interface must still be registered in the META-INF/services/liquibase.configuration.AutoloadedConfigurations file.
